decks.notes: This deck focuses on using the Phyrexian Dreadnought in combination with various counterspells and disruption cards to quickly assemble a powerful combo that can win the game in one explosive turn. By stifling opponent's plays and controlling the game with counter magic, the deck aims to protect its combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With careful timing and efficient use of resources, the deck can quickly overwhelm opponents and secure victory through a well-executed combo.

The main idea of this deck is to generate a large amount of mana quickly using cards like Ancient Tomb and City of Traitors, in order to cast powerful spells like Show and Tell and Dream Halls. By chaining together spells like Frantic Search and Meditate, the player can eventually combo off with Brain Freeze to mill their opponent's entire library. This Mono Blue Storm deck focuses on card draw, mana acceleration, and spell recursion to set up devastating combos and win the game in a single turn.

The deck revolves around using Ill-Gotten Gains to return key combo pieces back to hand, while also utilizing cards like Lion's Eye Diamond and Lotus Petal to quickly generate mana. Intuition is used to search for necessary combo pieces, with Brain Freeze being the win condition. The deck also runs cards like Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual to accelerate the combo. The inclusion of cards like Cephalid Coliseum and Deep Analysis provide card draw options, while Tormod's Crypt can disrupt graveyard strategies. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and win the game in a single turn.

This aggressive red and green deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures and efficient burn spells. The key strategy is to use cards like Survival of the Fittest to consistently find and play threats like Arrogant Wurm and Wild Mongrel early in the game. With a mix of fast creatures, direct damage spells, and disruptive cards like Wasteland, this deck aims to apply pressure from multiple angles and close out games before the opponent can establish a defensive board presence.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana production with lands and enchantments, while drawing cards and generating value through enchantress effects. The combo of Opalescence and Parallax Wave allows for a win condition by creating an infinite loop to exile all of the opponent's creatures. The deck also includes disruption with removal spells and protection with Solitary Confinement. Overall, the strategy revolves around creating a powerful board presence through enchantments and utilizing synergies to control the game and secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent through efficient and cheap burn spells and aggressive creatures. It aims to overwhelm the opponent and finish them off before they have a chance to stabilize. The deck includes powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, along with efficient creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Ball Lightning. The inclusion of Sulfuric Vortex helps to prevent the opponent from gaining life, while cards like Cursed Scroll provide additional direct damage. Overall, the deck is designed to be fast and relentless in its pursuit of victory.

The focus of this deck is to control the game through counterspells and disruption while aiming to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to win the game. By efficiently countering opponent's spells and manipulating card draw, the deck can set up the combo pieces while keeping the opponent off balance. The use of key cards like Foil and Gush not only provide utility but also facilitate the deck's strategy of stalling and disrupting the opponent before going for the combo finish.

The main idea behind this deck is to quickly assemble the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo by using cards like Stifle and Counterspell to protect it. The deck includes various card draw and manipulation spells to find the combo pieces as quickly as possible. Cards like Portent and Opt help dig for what is needed, while cards like Foil and Misdirection allow for protection against opposing disruption. With the right cards in hand, this deck can win the game in a single turn with the powerful Dreadnought combo.

The deck focuses on utilizing Survival of the Fittest to find key creatures and control the game through Opposition. The strategy revolves around using creatures with strong enter-the-battlefield effects and mana generation to disrupt opponent's plans and establish board presence. The deck aims to outvalue opponents through card advantage and efficient creature selection, using versatile creatures like Wall of Blossoms and flexible mana sources like City of Brass to maintain control of the game. By utilizing a mix of creature recursion, card draw, and mana acceleration, the deck aims to adapt to various situations and outmaneuver opponents.

This Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on early aggression and disruption, using cards like Withered Wretch, Knight of Stromgald, and Hypnotic Specter to put pressure on the opponent while also stripping away their resources with Cabal Therapy and Duress. The deck also includes removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict to deal with threats, and card draw engines like Graveborn Muse and Phyrexian Arena to maintain a steady stream of resources. With a mix of efficient creatures, disruption, and card advantage, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless onslaught.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through countermagic and hand disruption spells while controlling the board with Psychatog. By utilizing cards like Counterspell, Duress, and Smother, the deck aims to maintain control of the game and protect Psychatog as it grows in power. The deck also includes card draw spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Deep Analysis to ensure consistency and keep up with the opponent's resources. Psychatog serves as both a win condition and a tool for card advantage, making it a versatile threat in the deck.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Rorix Bladewing, Verdant Force, and Akroma, Angel of Wrath, then using cards like Reanimate and Exhume to bring them back onto the battlefield. Cabal Therapy, Duress, and Unmask help to disrupt the opponent's hand and game plan, while Dark Ritual can provide additional mana acceleration. Sickening Dreams can act as both removal and a finisher. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats early in the game and win before they have a chance to respond.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana sources, disrupting opponents' lands, and deploying powerful land destruction spells. By efficiently bringing out threats like Terravore and Nimble Mongoose, the deck pressures opponents while maintaining card advantage with cards like Sylvan Library and Call of the Herd. Additionally, the deck includes versatile removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Naturalize to handle various threats. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with aggression while controlling the game through land destruction and efficient creature deployment.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can catch opponents off guard. By utilizing control elements such as Counterspell and Vision Charm, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win condition. The inclusion of cantrips and card draw spells like Portent and Opt help to dig through the deck efficiently to find key pieces. This deck is designed to be swift and efficient in executing its combo strategy while maintaining a strong control presence.

The deck focuses on utilizing enchantments to generate a powerful board state and create a combo win condition. It aims to ramp up mana production using cards like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, while drawing cards and finding key pieces with Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile. The key combo involves using Opalescence to turn all enchantments into creatures and using Parallax Wave to exile all opposing creatures, leaving the opponent defenseless. The deck also includes protection and disruption with cards like Solitary Confinement and Seal of Cleansing.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using Zombie Infestation to create a steady stream of Zombie tokens, while also utilizing card draw and discard effects to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Key cards like Psychatog and Squee, Goblin Nabob provide additional threats and card advantage. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently trading resources and overwhelming them with a swarm of Zombies. The land base is focused on enabling Gush and Zombie Infestation, while also providing the necessary colors to cast spells consistently. Overall, the deck aims to grind out wins through incremental advantage and resource management.
